common.name: Name

home.heroDescription: Fast, reliable, and affordable shipping services. Track your shipments in real-time and enjoy hassle-free delivery to over 200 countries.
home.globalCoverageDesc: Ship to over 200 countries and territories worldwide with our extensive network.
home.fastDeliveryDesc: Get your packages delivered quickly with our optimized logistics network.
home.secureAndSafeDesc: Your packages are fully insured and handled with care every step of the way.

login.signInToAccount: Sign in to your ShipHub account

signup.passwordRequirements: Min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, 1 special char

signup.addressOptional: This step is optional. You can add an address later.

newRequest.title: New Shipping Request
newRequest.subtitle: Fill in the details to create a new shipping request

newRequest.notePlaceholder: e.g. Handle with care, leave at reception
newRequest.urgentSurchargeNote: Urgent delivery adds a 25% surcharge to the base cost.

newRequest.destinationSubtitle: Where should your shipment be delivered?

newRequest.scheduledDeliveryDesc: Pick a date for your shipment to be delivered
newRequest.availableDaysRequired: Select the days you are available for pickup (minimum 2 days required)

newRequest.deliveryDaysRequired: Select the days you are available for delivery (minimum 2 days required)
newRequest.commentsPlaceholder: Add any additional comments or special instructions

newRequest.assemblyCanItem: Can this item be assembled and disassembled?

newRequest.assemblySelf: I will handle the assembly and disassembly myself
newRequest.assemblyDriver: The driver will handle the assembly and disassembly for me
newRequest.packagingDesc: Professional packaging to protect during shipping (+10% additional cost)
newRequest.addAtLeastOne: Add at least one item to continue
newRequest.clickToClose: Click outside or press ESC to close
newRequest.errAddItem: Please add at least one item
newRequest.errAvailableDays: Please select at least 2 available days
newRequest.errCollectionDays: Please select at least 2 collection days
newRequest.errDeliveryDays: Please select at least 2 delivery days

newRequest.errRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
newRequest.errAssemblyHandlerForItems: Please select who will handle assembly/disassembly for:
newRequest.errAssemblyHandler: Please select who will handle assembly and disassembly
newRequest.errRequiredItemFields: Please fill in all required item fields
newRequest.verificationRequiredDesc: Please verify your email and mobile number before creating a shipping request. This helps us ensure secure and reliable service.
newRequest.needsWinchDropoff: I need winch for drop off
newRequest.addWorkersDesc: Select the number of workers needed to help with loading/unloading (0 to 6)
newRequest.transportVehicleDesc: Select the type of transport vehicle suitable for your shipment
